nasb.text: The captain of the guard also took away the firepans and the basins, what was fine gold and what was fine silver.

esv.text: the fire pans also and the bowls. What was of gold the captain of the guard took away as gold, and what was of silver, as silver.

cnv.text: 此外，火鼎和碗，無論是金的或是銀的，護衛長都拿去了。

ccb.text: 护卫长还带走了火鼎、碗等一切金银器具。
